text: abstain_on_unanswerable_rate measures how often the system declines unknown questions instead of guessing.
abstain_on_answerable_rate should stay low; high values indicate over-refusal on answerable items.
hallucination_rate_on_unanswerable tracks wrong answers on unanswerable prompts and should be near zero.
retrievalMode supports lexical and hybrid. Hybrid combines lexical matching with embedding similarity.
hybridMinLexicalScore sets a lexical anchor floor so semantic-only matches can be filtered.
agentic_rag returns mode, confidence, answer, rationale, context, hits, and metrics.
